---
title: "Thomas Richard Frederick Cooke Trench"
---

## Thomas Richard Frederick Cooke Trench

**Dates:** (18 Aug 1829-26 Nov 1902)

### Description

son-in-law of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

He married (17 Aug 1858) Caroline Elizabeth Heathcote (1833-24 Nov 1910).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
